reference: IT WAS DRAWING TOWARDS THE CLOSE OF THIS DELIGHTFUL HONEYMOON TOUR AND IT WAS A BRIGHT SUNSHINY MORNING EARLY IN FEBRUARY BUT FEBRUARY IN PARIS IS SOMETIMES BETTER THAN APRIL IN LONDON
text: He was drawing towards the close of this delightful honeymoon tour, and it was a bright, sunshiny morning early in February. But February in Paris is sometimes better than April in London.
